^2 = GameID: BLES01225
^3 = NAME: Disgaea 4
^5 = APCRED: From Game Genie For PS3 and CMP
^4 = FILE: SAVEDATA.DAT
+Max Hl
$20000AA8 00000918
$20000AAC 4E729FFF
+Reset Game Save Time
$20000008 00000000

$2044C404 3B9AC9FF
